name: Valley of Kings
desc: Tombs of forgotten pharaohs wait in the cliffs.

name: Delphi
desc: The oracle's sanctuary, whispering with old prophecies.

name: Petra
desc: A rose-red city half as old as time, carved into the rock.

name: Angkor Wat
desc: A vast temple drowned in jungle silence.

name: Ajanta Caves
desc: Buddhist cave temples painted in a horseshoe gorge.

name: Teotihuacan
desc: The city of the gods, with pyramids of sun and moon.

name: Chichen Itza
desc: A Mayan city where the serpent descends the pyramid.

name: Great Zimbabwe
desc: Massive stone walls with no mortar, older than memory.

name: Mohenjo-daro
desc: Ruins of a city from the dawn of civilization.

name: Mogao Caves
desc: A thousand caves of painted Buddhas on the Silk Road.
